---
title: "Javier Enrique Aguilar"
subtitle: "Doctoral researcher Computer Science"
#comments: false
from: markdown+emoji
image: graphics/me.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope-fill
      href: mailto:javier.aguilarr@icloud.com
    - text: Github
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/jear2412
    
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: full
aliases:
  - /about
---

I am a doctoral researcher at the [Cluster of Excellence SimTech](https://www.simtech.uni-stuttgart.de) at the University of Stuttgart and a research assistant at [TU Dortmund](https://compstat.statistik.tu-dortmund.de/en/). My supervisor is [Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io). Before, I studied a Master's degree in Probability and Statistics at the Center for Research in Mathematics [CIMAT](https://ppe.cimat.mx) in Guanajuato, Mexico, under the supervision of [Andrés Christen](https://www.cimat.mx/~jac/).

I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Bayesian Computation, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

Be sure to [contact me](mailto:javier.aguilarr@icloud.com) if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.
